query: SELECT s.id, s.name, s.groupName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE customers.source = s.name) as customerCount FROM sources s WHERE s.groupName = 'Gulf' OR s.groupName = 'MEA' OR s.name = 'LINE' ORDER BY s.groupName, s.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AnaPRc1Kpw1Jvjc.659756d42373 --database 6acGApiU8Bjnxuzxb5vkwU --execute SELECT s.id, s.name, s.groupName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE customers.source = s.name) as customerCount FROM sources s WHERE s.groupName = 'Gulf' OR s.groupName = 'MEA' OR s.name = 'LINE' ORDER BY s.groupName, s.name;
